title: Potugadu
subTitle: Two men serendipitously encounter each other as they decide to commit suicide. However, things take a turn as the duo bond over their personal life story and dilemmas.

title: Navul Navul
subTitle: When a man is accused of murder and lands in prison, he breaks out from jail cross-dressed as a woman to nab the actual culprits.

title: Sambarala Rambabu
subTitle: Bringing the best in cinema.

title: Navul Navul
subTitle: When a man is accused of murder and lands in prison, he breaks out from jail cross-dressed as a woman to nab the actual culprits.

title: Gangmaster
subTitle: Chakraborty, a goon, wants to avenge his younger brother's murder by killing Purushottam's daughter, Pooja. However, Raja, a lecturer in her college, promises Purushottam to protect her.

title: The Lords Challenge
subTitle: A religious scholar delivers a discourse about the teachings of the Bible to urge the devotees to follow a righteous path.

title: Allare Allari
subTitle: Ramulamma, a widow, is imprisoned after killing the murderers of her husband. Before leaving, she promises her daughter's hand in marriage to her nephew, but things take a turn in her absence.

title: Adhinetha
subTitle: An unemployed commoner is drifting aimlessly in life but also helping people. When he gets the opportunity to become the chief minister, he decides to use his power for good.

title: Loafar
subTitle: Raja, who thinks his mother is dead, turns into a thief. However, his life changes when he falls for Mounika, a girl who is escaping a forced marriage, and eventually meets her aunt.

title: Kondaveeti Raja
subTitle: An archaeologist's assistant goes to a village to unearth the secret to a hidden treasure. However, he faces competition from a rich man who had killed his sister.

title: Aadi
subTitle: Aadi, who is raised by his father's faithful employee, learns about how his parents were cheated and killed by Nagi Reddy. Enraged by the injustice done to his family, he decides to confront Nagi.

title: Dorasani
subTitle: Raju, who belongs to a poor family, falls in love with Dorasani, the daughter of a rich landlord. However, her father stands as a stumbling block to their relationship.

title: Dorasani
subTitle: Raju, who belongs to a poor family, falls in love with Dorasani, the daughter of a rich landlord. However, her father stands as a stumbling block to their relationship.

title: Navul Navul
subTitle: When a man is accused of murder and lands in prison, he breaks out from jail cross-dressed as a woman to nab the actual culprits.

title: Chelleli Kapuram
subTitle: Shobhan Babu, a struggling poet, is unable to publish his work due to his dark complexion. Later, he decides to publish his poems under his friend's name.

title: Navul Navul
subTitle: When a man is accused of murder and lands in prison, he breaks out from jail cross-dressed as a woman to nab the actual culprits.

title: Mallepuvvu
subTitle: Koti, a construction worker, helps Malli, unaware of the fact that he is a woman in disguise. Soon, things turn upside down when the police get involved.

title: Aavide Shyamala
subTitle: Prakash wants to become rich overnight. On his birthday, he takes a loan from his friend and goes to Hyderabad to fulfil his dreams, leaving his wife to fend for herself and the children.

title: Prema Kavali
subTitle: Srinu loves Prema but she does not reciprocate his feelings. He kisses Prema in an unexpected situation, which a stranger captures on camera and later uses it to blackmail her.

title: Seshadri Naidu
subTitle: Seshadri is a good man who feeds the poor in his restaurant. However, when his sister commits suicide due to a few unscrupulous people, Seshadri seeks revenge from them.

title: Ism
subTitle: While doing his mission to eradicate corruption, an undercover journalist experiences a forbidden relationship when he falls in love with a high-profile gangster's daughter.

title: Manasunna Maaraju
subTitle: A benevolent landlord helps an ambitious girl who aspires to become a doctor. While the two spend time with each other, they fall in love and get married.

title: Brahma Rudrulu
subTitle: Justice Jagadish Chandra Prasad, a disciple of law, decides to fight a case for his nephew Satyam, who is framed for the murder of Jyothi, his classmate and lover.

title: Brahma Rudrulu
subTitle: Justice Jagadish Chandra Prasad, a disciple of law, decides to fight a case for his nephew Satyam, who is framed for the murder of Jyothi, his classmate and lover.

title: Navul Navul
subTitle: When a man is accused of murder and lands in prison, he breaks out from jail cross-dressed as a woman to nab the actual culprits.

title: Mooga Manasulu
subTitle: Gopinath and Radha, a newlywed couple, embark on their honeymoon. However, their trip takes an unexpected turn when Gopinath begins experiencing flashbacks of his past life.

title: Navul Navul
subTitle: When a man is accused of murder and lands in prison, he breaks out from jail cross-dressed as a woman to nab the actual culprits.

title: Roommates
subTitle: Four poor musicians get framed in a murder case which lands them in jail. So, they escape with hopes of proving their innocence.

title: Peddamma Thalli
subTitle: Goddes Peddamma Thalli intervenes to protect her faithful devotees from evil schemes of wicked people who are hell-bent on destroying the lives of the innocent.

title: Shankardada Zindabad
subTitle: A local goon, Shankar, pretends to be a professor to get close to a radio jockey, Jahnavi. But when the old-age home Jahnavi runs is in danger, Shankar is forced to reveal his true job.

title: Ammoru Thalli
subTitle: Orphan Durga grows up believing that Goddess Kamakshi is her mother. When an international criminal gang and a magician try to steal from an ancient temple, the goddess herself descends on earth.

title: Two Countries
subTitle: Ullas schemes to marry Simran, woman with a disability, to avoid repaying a debt, but faces complications when Laya, a wealthy alcoholic, enters his life, turning his plans upside down.

title: Dictator
subTitle: Chandu lives happily with his family in Hyderabad. However, things take a turn when he gets arrested for a crime he did not commit.

title: Tappuchesi Pappukudu
subTitle: Sivaji is desperate for money when he meets his old friend Ramesh, a con artist. They rob a bank with Pedda and Cheecha, but Pedda gets arrested without telling the rest where he hid the money.
